rationale: Target identified as the large central house in the mid-frame. Bounding box traced at approximately x:360–630, y:440–795 (270×355 px). The roof is L/T-shaped with a complex hip-dominant layout. Applied ~15% cutout reduction for the upper-left recess and internal shadow areas where overhanging trees partially obscure edges. Two main ridge runs (~225 px total), six hip corners at an average of ~70 px each, two to three valley intersections where roof wings join (~135 px), two to three gable rakes (~100 px), and a multi-segment eave perimeter totaling ~620 px. Scale: 1 px = 0.1867 ft; 1 sq px = 0.034849 sq ft. Confidence is moderate-low (0.38) due to heavy tree shadow coverage partially obscuring roof edges, possible misidentification of attached vs. detached structure, and image resolution limitations.
